title: Case 102: The Hoofprints That Scaled Walls
description: In 1855, cloven hoofprints appeared across 40 miles of Devon in a single night, scaling vertical walls and crossing rooftops. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 102: The Hoofprints That Scaled Walls...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Department of the Unknown declassifies the Devon hoofprints case. Something walked 40 miles in one night, defying all known physics. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: Hoofprints scaled vertical walls in 1855 Devon. 40 miles in one night. Physics couldn't explain it. #horror #mystery #paranormal #unexplained #fyp

instagram_metadata.reels_caption: What walks upright but leaves cloven hooves? In 1855, something crossed 40 miles of Devon in one night, scaling walls and rooftops. The tracks remain unexplained. #horror #mystery #paranormal #unexplained #truecrime #devon #scary

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: February 1855: Hoofprints appeared across 40 miles of Devon overnight, scaling vertical walls. No earthly creature could have made them.
